# BayLum ![](reference/figures/logo_BayLum.png)

[![r-universe](https://crp2a.r-universe.dev/badges/BayLum)](https://crp2a.r-universe.dev/BayLum)
[![CRAN
Version](https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/BayLum)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=BayLum)
[![CRAN
checks](https://badges.cranchecks.info/worst/BayLum.svg)](https://cran.r-project.org/web/checks/check_results_BayLum.html)
[![CRAN
Downloads](https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/BayLum)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=BayLum)

[![Project Status: Active – The project has reached a stable, usable
state and is being actively
developed.](https://www.repostatus.org/badges/latest/active.svg)](https://www.repostatus.org/#active)

[![DOI
Zenodo](https://zenodo.org/badge/DOI/10.5281/zenodo.4311266.svg)](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.4311266)
[![CRAN
DOI](https://img.shields.io/badge/doi-10.32614/CRAN.package.BayLum-blue.svg)](https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.BayLum)

An R package for chronological **Bay**esian models integrated for
Optically Stimulated (OSL) **Lum**inescence Dating

``` R
To cite the R package 'BayLum' please cite the R package itself and the
following article:

  Christophe C, Philippe A, Kreutzer S, Guérin G, Baumgarten F,
  Frerebeau N (2026). _BayLum: Chronological Bayesian Models
  Integrating Optically Stimulated Luminescence and Radiocarbon Age
  Dating_. R package version 0.3.3.9000-5,
  <https://CRAN.r-project.org/package=BayLum>.

  Philippe A, Guerin G, Kreutzer S (2019). "BayLum - An R package for
  Bayesian analysis of OSL ages: An introduction." _Quaternary
  Geochronology_, *49*, 16-24. doi:10.1016/j.quageo.2018.05.009
  <https://doi.org/10.1016/j.quageo.2018.05.009>.
```

## Installation

**You need to have [JAGS](https://mcmc-jags.sourceforge.io) installed on
your computer.**

You can install the released version of **BayLum** from
[CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org) with:

``` r
install.packages("BayLum")
```

And the development version from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("crp2a/BayLum")
```

Please note that development versions may change day by day.

## Acknowledgements

The development of **BayLum** received a state financial support managed
by the Agence Nationale de la Recherche (France) through the program
*Investissements d’avenir* (ref. ANR-10-LABX-52) between 2015 and 2018.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`AgeC14_Computation()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/AgeC14_Computation.md)
  : Bayesian analysis for C-14 age estimations of various samples

- [`AgeS`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/AgeS.md) :

  Output of `AgeS_Computation` function for the samples: "GDB5" and
  "GDB3"

- [`AgeS_Computation()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/AgeS_Computation.md)
  : Bayesian analysis for OSL age estimation of various samples

- [`Age_Computation()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/Age_Computation.md)
  : Bayesian analysis for the OSL age estimation of one sample

- [`Age_OSLC14()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/Age_OSLC14.md)
  : Bayesian analysis for age estimation of OSL measurements and C-14
  ages of various samples

- [`DATA1`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/DATA1.md) :
  DATA of sample named GDB3

- [`DATA2`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/DATA2.md) :
  DATA on sample named GDB5

- [`DATA3`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/DATA3.md) :
  DATA of sample named FER1

- [`DATA_C14`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/DATA_C14.md)
  : C14 cal age estiamte and its error

- [`Generate_DataFile()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/Generate_DataFile-deprecated.md)
  : Generates, from one (or several) BIN-file(s) of Single-grain OSL
  measurements, a list of luminescence data and information before
  statistical analysis (DEPRECATED)

- [`Generate_DataFile_MG()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/Generate_DataFile_MG-deprecated.md)
  : Generates, from one (or several) BIN file(s) of Multi-grain OSL
  measurements a list of luminescence data and information before
  statistical analysis (DEPRECATED)

- [`IntCal13`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/IntCal13.md)
  : Atmospheric North data for calibration of 14C age

- [`IntCal20`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/IntCal20.md)
  : Atmospheric North data for calibration of 14C age

- [`LT_RegenDose()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/LT_RegenDose-deprecated.md)
  : Plots Lx/Tx as a function of the regenerative dose (DEPRECATED)

- [`MCMCsample`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/MCMCsample.md)
  : MCMC sample from the posterior distribution of the dataset GDB5

- [`Marine13`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/Marine13.md)
  : Marine data for calibration of 14C age

- [`Marine20`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/Marine20.md)
  : Marine data for calibration of 14C age

- [`ModelC14`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/ModelC14.md)
  :

  Likelihood of C14 samples for JAGS models use in `Age_OSLC14`

- [`ModelOSL`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/ModelOSL.md)
  :

  Likelihood of OSL samples for JAGS models use in `Age_OSLC14`

- [`ModelPrior`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/ModelPrior.md)
  :

  Prior for JAGS models use in `Age_OSLC14`

- [`Model_Age`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/Model_Age.md)
  :

  JAGS models use in `Age_Computation`

- [`Model_AgeC14`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/Model_AgeC14.md)
  :

  JAGS models use in `AgeC14_Computation`

- [`Model_AgeS`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/Model_AgeS.md)
  :

  JAGS models use in `AgeS_Computation`

- [`Model_Palaeodose`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/Model_Palaeodose.md)
  :

  JAGS models use in `Palaeodose_Computation`

- [`Palaeodose_Computation()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/Palaeodose_Computation.md)
  : Bayesian analysis for the palaeodose estimation of various samples

- [`SCMatrix()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/SCMatrix.md)
  : Construct the Stratigraphic Constrain Matrix Interactively

- [`SC_Ordered()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/SC_Ordered.md)
  : Create Stratigraphically Ordered Sample Matrix

- [`SHCal13`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/SHCal13.md) :
  Atmospheric South data for calibration of 14C age

- [`SHCal20`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/SHCal20.md) :
  Atmospheric South data for calibration of 14C age

- [`combine_DataFiles()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/combine_DataFiles.md)
  [`Concat_DataFile()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/combine_DataFiles.md)
  : Combine objects

- [`create_DataFile()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/create_DataFile.md)
  : Prepare input data for subsequent BayLum Analysis

- [`create_FolderTemplates()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/create_FolderTemplates.md)
  : Create Folder Templates

- [`create_ThetaMatrix()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/create_ThetaMatrix.md)
  : Create Theta Matrix

- [`plot_Ages()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/plot_Ages.md)
  : Create Age Plot

- [`plot_MCMC()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/plot_MCMC.md)
  : Plot MCMC trajectories and posterior distributions

- [`plot_RegDosePoints()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/plot_RegDosePoints.md)
  : Plot Regeneration Dose Points

- [`plot_Scatterplots()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/plot_Scatterplots.md)
  [`ScatterSamples()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/plot_Scatterplots.md)
  : Display Scatter Plot Matrix of the Bayesian Age Results

- [`write_BayLumFiles()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/write_BayLumFiles.md)
  : Write BayLum .csv-files

- [`write_YAMLConfigFile()`](https://crp2a.github.io/BayLum/dev/reference/write_YAMLConfigFile.md)
  : Write Auto Generated YAML BayLum Configuration File to the Disc
